rationale: Fonteva publishes no scrapable OpenAPI spec or sample-response corpus (fontevacontext.md §8 — 'I would not assume there is a complete public OpenAPI spec'). These fixtures are therefore fully synthetic test data, not scrubbed real responses. Field API NAMES are docs-derived (the OrderApi__/EventApi__ managed-package namespaces and the documented camelCase service convention, fontevacontext.md §4); all VALUES are invented.

piiSafety.ids: well-formed but synthetic Salesforce 18-char Ids (object-prefixed + AAA suffix)

sources.UsedFor: §4 camelCase mapping convention, §5 Search Request params, §11 fixture dataset shape + edge cases, §6 service areas

edgeCasesCovered: member vs nonmember (Is_Member__c + member/list price pair on Item #1)
duplicate contact (Contact #10 duplicates #2 by case-different email)
5 unmapped custom __c fields on a Contact
